person.name: Raed Guembri
person.tagline: I design and ship full-stack systems where architecture, interface motion, and developer discipline work like one instrument.
person.summary: From Web GIS platforms and AI-assisted recruitment tools to dashboards, automated quality systems, VPS deployments, and data-heavy products, I build software that feels fast, legible, observable, and ready to scale.
person.availability: Open to software engineering, architecture, QA automation, and AI-integrated product work.

experience.summary: Built a full-stack Web GIS platform with Angular and NestJS for spatial visualization, asset management, and map-heavy analysis workflows.
experience.impact: Improved performance, maintainability, and scalability through clean architecture, API versioning, optimized spatial data delivery, and production deployment monitoring.
highlights: Designed a PostGIS schema optimized for fast spatial queries and geometry operations.
Configured GeoServer to publish WMS and WFS services for efficient map layer delivery.
Integrated Leaflet with custom controls, real-time editing, and dynamic spatial rendering.
Deployed applications to VPS environments with Docker and monitored both server health and application behavior in production.
Refined the overall system with cleaner contracts and more reliable data-fetching flows.

experience.summary: Strengthened end-to-end testing for a React, Next.js, and PostgreSQL application with maintainable Playwright suites written in TypeScript.
experience.impact: Improved regression confidence and long-term test scalability across critical UI and API user flows.
highlights: Expanded comprehensive end-to-end coverage around business-critical journeys.
Created reusable page-object patterns that made tests easier to extend and maintain.
Automated fragile flows to reduce manual regression effort.
Raised reliability across complex UI and API interaction paths.

experience.summary: Planned and built a recruitment platform from scratch, combining full-stack delivery with AI-driven profile analysis and interview assessment.
experience.impact: Improved evaluation efficiency by 40% through automated skill matching, feedback processing, and decision-support scoring.
highlights: Built the platform architecture to streamline hiring workflows from end to end.
Integrated AI analysis for candidate profiles and interview performance.
Implemented scalable APIs and robust data pipelines for real-time scoring.
Turned raw assessments into structured decision-support insights.

experience.summary: Delivered new B2B application features and an analytics dashboard that helped clients move faster through onboarding and daily operations.
experience.impact: Reduced onboarding time by around 10 hours per implementation cycle and cut reporting time by 30% with better dashboard flows.
highlights: Built an intuitive analytics dashboard for interactive operational metrics.
Integrated MongoDB for real-time data retrieval and visualization.
Improved product usability with cleaner component architecture.
Optimized data pipelines so decision-making happened faster.

principles: Design systems should feel intentional, not decorative. Every surface has a job.
Architecture matters most when it improves clarity, speed, and long-term changeability.
Testing is part of product confidence, not just a final checkpoint.
AI belongs inside useful workflows, never as empty spectacle.
